intro: European energy and manufacturing sectors faced heightened risk in mid-April 2026, with eight ZCyberNews articles covering OT security between 13 and 26 April. The threat actor APT33 was observed, alongside the critical-severity vulnerability CVE-2026-24032 (CVSS 7.3). The coverage included two high-severity, four informational, one critical, and one medium-severity report, impacting critical-infrastructure, industrial, and utilities across Europe, Global, Middle east, and North america regions.
